project_type: TypeScript monorepo - multi-app platform with 13 Next.js/Fastify apps, 17 services, 37 packages
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turbo. turbo.json defines lint, typecheck (depends ^build), test (depends ^build), build (depends ^build, outputs dist/**), dev (no cache, persistent)
test_framework: vitest with vitest.config.ts per package. Tests in __tests__/ dirs or co-located test files
verification_instructions: Run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma generates client from packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma. Build produces dist/ dirs.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Docker available for docker-compose.dev.yml (postgres, redis, minio, mailhog, meilisearch, nats, redpanda, qdrant). No staging env yet.
contribution_requirements: Do not weaken global strictness. Prefer small verifiable increments. Every phase must end with command output evidence. Update .agents/state/ files. All quality gates must continue to pass.
key_patterns: Apps use createApp() from @quant/server-core which auto-registers /healthz and /readyz. Services (non-HTTP workers) use standalone main() pattern. All apps have backend/app.ts with getConfig() and buildApp(). Docker compose dev has postgres:5432, redis:6379, minio:9000, mailhog:1025/8025, meilisearch:7700, nats:4222, redpanda:9092, qdrant:6333. shared-ui has design tokens, themes, AppShell, TopBar, BottomNav, CommandPalette, ThemeEngine. Database has Prisma schema and faker-based seed.ts.
directory_structure: apps/ (13 Next.js+Fastify apps), services/ (17 backend services, 6 have package.json), packages/ (37 shared packages), scripts/ (test.cjs, ml/)
